title: Nether Skeletons
description: A MOD Which Adds Nether Skeletons
body:
Not enough skeletons in the nether? Sure, there are wither and normal skeletons, but what about other types? This mod is here to fix that. 

Available For  Ten Versions Of The Game!

 Report any bugs, problems, or feature requests to the issue tracker

 

This MOD adds;

- Nine brand new skeletons to battle it out with through the depths of hell

- Custom creative tab for easy access of spawn eggs

- Custom AI, with each skeleton requiring different methods to kill and each doing different things

 

Textures By; Kemiu and ShinyDragon96

 

Partnered with BisectHosting:  https://bisecthosting.com/GlitchedMastery

(Use Code: GLITCHEDMASTERY for 25% off!)
